services.name: Hospital Chiriquí
services.notes: Nearest major hospital, 24/7 emergency, some English-speaking staff, 45 min drive from Boquete

services.name: Farmacia Don Bosco Boquete
services.notes: Local pharmacy in town center, basic medications, personal care products

services.name: Romero Supermarket Boquete
services.notes: Largest supermarket in town, fresh produce, imported goods, local products

services.name: Banco Nacional de Panamá - Boquete
services.notes: Full-service branch, ATM, expat account services

services.name: Boquete Health Center (Centro de Salud)
services.notes: Government health clinic, basic care and consultations, limited English

services.name: Dental Center Boquete
services.notes: General and cosmetic dentistry, English-speaking dentist, expat-friendly pricing

services.name: Clínica Veterinaria Boquete
services.notes: Small animal vet, vaccinations, spay/neuter, some English spoken

services.name: Boquete River Trail (Sendero del Río)
services.notes: Riverside walking path, dogs allowed off-leash in quieter sections, scenic mountain views

services.name: Boquete Fitness & Spa
services.notes: Small local gym, weights and cardio, yoga classes, popular with expats

services.name: Boquete Community Church
services.notes: English-language non-denominational church, active expat congregation

services.name: Boquete Community Players & Library
services.notes: Expat community center, English library, theater group, social events

services.name: Aeropuerto Enrique Malek (DAV)
services.notes: Regional airport, domestic flights to Panama City (1 hr), 45 min drive from Boquete

services.name: Boquete Bus Terminal
services.notes: Local buses to David (1 hr, $1.75), colectivos to surrounding areas

services.name: Boquete Coworking at Kotowa Coffee House
services.notes: Informal coworking with strong WiFi, popular with digital nomads, great coffee

attractions.name: Volcán Barú
attractions.description: Panama's highest peak (3,475m), see both Pacific and Atlantic oceans from summit, overnight hike or 4x4
attractions.frequency: Year-round, best dry season Dec-Apr, guide recommended

attractions.name: Lost Waterfalls Trail (Las Tres Cascadas)
attractions.description: Moderate 3.5km trail through cloud forest to three stunning waterfalls
attractions.frequency: Daily, best in morning, muddy in rainy season (May-Nov)

attractions.name: Kotowa Coffee Estate Tour
attractions.description: Award-winning estate tour covering coffee cultivation, processing, and tasting

attractions.name: Caldera Hot Springs
attractions.description: Natural volcanic hot springs in the Caldera River valley, relaxing soak in jungle setting
attractions.frequency: Open daily, best to visit with local guide

attractions.name: Pipeline Trail (Sendero Los Quetzales)
attractions.description: Famous 9.6km birdwatching trail through cloud forest, resplendent quetzal sightings
attractions.frequency: Best early morning Jan-May for quetzals, guide recommended

attractions.name: Boquete Tuesday Market
attractions.description: Weekly expat and local market with fresh produce, baked goods, crafts, and food stalls

attractions.name: Boquete Jazz & Blues Festival
attractions.description: Annual music festival attracting international artists, held in outdoor mountain venues

attractions.name: Finca Lérida Coffee Estate & Birding
attractions.description: Historic coffee estate with birdwatching trails, over 500 species recorded in the region

attractions.name: Boquete Flower & Coffee Festival (Feria de las Flores y del Café)
attractions.description: Major annual fair with flower shows, coffee competitions, live music, and local food
